summary: Completed comprehensive dark theme testing for KOLOR STUDIO CRM. All 13 features verified successfully - Landing page, Login, Signup, Forgot Password, Reset Password, Dashboard (Kanban & List views), Lead Detail Modal (Activity/Files/Details tabs), Add Lead Modal, and Inquiry form all display correctly with dark theme. Purple/violet brand colors preserved for buttons and accents. Text has proper contrast (white/gray on dark backgrounds).
passed_tests: Landing page displays with dark background (#0f0f0f / rgb(15,15,15))
Landing page text is white with proper contrast
Landing page features cards use dark styling (#1f1f1f)
Purple/violet gradient buttons visible (Get Started, Start for free)
Login page has dark theme with proper form styling
Login card background is #1f1f1f
Login inputs have dark background (#1a1a1a)
Login submit button is violet (rgb(124, 58, 237))
Signup page has dark theme with proper form styling
Forgot Password page has dark theme
Reset Password page has dark theme
Dashboard loads with dark theme (#0f0f0f background)
Dashboard stats cards display with dark styling and colored icons
Kanban board columns have colorful headers (blue, purple, orange, pink, green)
Lead cards have dark background (#1f1f1f) with proper contrast
Add Lead button is purple/violet
Search input has dark styling
View toggle buttons (Kanban/List) work correctly
Lead Detail Modal opens with purple gradient header
Activity tab shows notes input and activity timeline with dark styling
Files tab shows file dropzone and uploaded files with proper contrast
Details tab shows client info and portal section with dark styling
Add Lead Modal has dark theme with purple header
All form inputs across app have dark backgrounds (#1a1a1a) and white text
Inquiry form page (/inquiry) has dark theme
All submit/CTA buttons use purple/violet color (rgb(124, 58, 237))
critical_code_review_comments: Dark theme implementation is consistent across all pages using Tailwind custom colors (dark.bg, dark.card, dark.border)
Color palette well-defined in tailwind.config.js with dark theme and primary/accent colors
Body base styles properly set in index.css with #0f0f0f background and white text
Purple/violet brand colors (#8b5cf6, #7c3aed) correctly applied to CTAs, links, and accents
Proper contrast maintained - white/gray text on dark backgrounds for readability
Client Portal page intentionally kept with light theme (as per requirements)
Modal overlays use bg-black/70 for proper dark backdrop
seed_data_creation: No seed data required - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark theme implementation is complete and working. All pages except Client Portal use dark theme. Color palette: Background #0f0f0f, Cards #1f1f1f, Borders #333333, Inputs #1a1a1a. Purple accents #8b5cf6 / #7c3aed. All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
